scripts.seo:audit:live: node scripts/audit-live-seo.mjs && node scripts/audit-live-school-name-quality.mjs && node scripts/audit-live-top-school-funnel.mjs && node scripts/audit-live-free-exam-funnel.mjs && node scripts/audit-live-broad-landing-funnels.mjs && node scripts/audit-live-sitemap-priority-schools.mjs
